author: KoreForge
name: KoreForge Data Library
description: Database-first EF Core data library with scaffold scripts, partial-class extension, and DI registration. The -n name must be two-part (e.g. My.App).

DatabaseShort.description: Short database name used in folders, namespaces, and class prefixes (e.g. Alerts, Staff). Class names are derived by appending Db/DB (AlertsDb, AlertsDB).

SchemaName.description: SQL schema name for entity namespace/folder. For dbo schemas, set this to the DatabaseShort value to collapse the extra segment.

SolutionName.description: Display/package name for the solution (e.g. KoreForge.Data, MyCompany.Data).

manualInstructions.text: Run 'dotnet tool restore' to install dotnet-ef.
